notes_and_limitations.notes_line_1: Participant primarily transported by parents; family requests that overnight return times not be later than 10:30 PM when possible due to early morning school schedule and participant’s tendency to get migraines when severely sleep-deprived.
notes_and_limitations.notes_line_2: Participant experiences mild seasonal allergies (pollen and grass) that may occasionally cause sneezing or watery eyes during outdoor activities; over-the-counter antihistamines (e.g., loratadine) usually control symptoms effectively and are kept with parent/guardian unless separate medication form is provided.
